author: IGN YouTube
text:
ONE PIECE HEROINES - Official Trailer (English Subtitles)
Check out the latest trailer for ONE PIECE HEROINES, a special anime episode celebrating the charm of the heroines of ONE PIECE. Broadcasting in Japan on July 5, 2026.

After buying a pair of shoes that end up hurting her feet, Nami returns to the shop feeling dissatisfied.
There, she meets Lebno, the designer, who tells her, “I’ll make you a brand-new pair from scratch—but only if you’ll be my model.” The shoes are crafted by the artisan Miucha, leading to an unexpected and stylish encounter.

ONE PIECE HEROINES is an anime that showcases the charm of the heroines of ONE PIECE through stories not told in the main series. Based on the novel series ONE PIECE novel HEROINES, originally featured in ONE PIECE magazine, the episode “Episode: NAMI” is being adapted into anime form. Set in the world of the main story and featuring familiar characters such as Robin, a brand-new story unfolds.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight - Official Gadgets Gameplay Trailer
Don't miss the Gadgets Gameplay Trailer for LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight, a third-person action-adventure game developed by TT Games. Players can get a look at some of Batman's most useful gadgets, such as the Batclaw, Concussive Batarang, Bat Swarm, and more. LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store), with a release on Nintendo Switch 2 on September 18.

PlayStation Disc Production to End January 2028 - IGN Daily Fix
Sony has announced physical disc production ends in January 2028 for new games on PlayStation consoles. Plus, the PlayStation Plus monthly games lineup for July 2026 has been confirmed — and it includes Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3. Daemon has all that and more on your Daily Fix!

text:
Fool Night - Official Teaser Trailer (English Subtitles)
Check out the trailer for the upcoming anime, Fool Night! "Fool Night," the first collaboration between Sunrise and Shaft, starts streaming worldwide in 2026, only on Netflix. 

"Living... there isn’t a single thing fun about it." In a dark world full of despair, he chooses the path of transforming into a Spirit Flower — a plant into which humans transform. Should he continue living as a person, or discard his pain and start a new life as a plant? Which path would you choose in his situation?

text:
Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls - Official Iron Man Character Guide Trailer
Take a look at the Iron Man Character Guide Trailer for Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, the upcoming action fighting game developed by ARC System Works. Players can get the rundown on Iron Man's serial movements, moveset, projectiles, and more to dish out attacks with the signature Armor Mk. 91: Sho-Gun skin. Declare yourself as Iron Man in Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, launching on August 6 for PlayStation 5 (PS5) and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store)

#IGN #Gaming #Marvel

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dead or Alive 6 Last Round Review
Dead or Alive 6 Last Round Reviewed by Will Borger on PC, also available on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.

Dead or Alive 6 Last Round is a great fighting game wrapped up in a very bad package. If you've never played it before, this is a good time to try a game that still has a lot going for it. But if you’re a fan hoping for long-awaited improvements like rollback netcode, cross-platform play, Tag Battle, or even just some new content… this ain't it. Things you'd expect from the definitive edition of a fighting game in 2026 simply aren't here. Rollback is the standard now. Cross-platform play is the standard. In a world where all the DLC was included, or Tag Battle was added, or where there were new characters and stages included at release, those omissions would be easier to forgive. But that's not the world we live in. Dead or Alive 6 is still a great fighting game. But it deserved a better last round.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
DinoBlade - Official Release Date Trailer
Get a look at the Release Date Trailer for DinoBlade, a melee-based action soulslike dinosaur RPG developed by Team Spino. Players will fight across a prehistoric era as a young sword-wielding Spinosaurus. Take on enemy dinosaurs and prevent an extinction event in DinoBlade, launching on July 23 for PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Wild Wild Eden - Official Announcement Trailer
Don't miss the Announcement Trailer for Wild Wild Eden, a third-person survival action creature-collecting RPG developed by Magnus Games Studio. Players will explore a sprawling and vibrant world full of as a tribal chief caring for monster companions. Assemble a base of operations, nurture an array of monsters, and uncover long-forgotten secrets along the way. Wild Wild Eden is launching into Early Access in Spring 2027 for PC (Steam).
